revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月二十]][[zh:十二月二十]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 20|qq=December 20}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Ten'en|en|Ten'en|qid=Q1327245|lt=Tennen|1=Ten'en}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|974|en|974|qid=Q23781|lt=974|1=974}} {{ill|January 16|en|January 16|qid=Q2261|lt=January 16|1=January 16}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Tenroku|en|Tenroku|qid=Q1327229|lt=Tenroku|1=Tenroku}} to {{ill|Ten'en|en|Ten'en|qid=Q1327245|lt=Tennen|1=Ten'en}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. {{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * {{ill|Hōgen (era)|en|Hōgen (era)|qid=Q1193898|lt=Hōgen|1=Hōgen (era)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1159|en|1159|qid=Q19659|lt=1159|1=1159}} {{ill|January 11|en|January 11|qid=Q2247|lt=January 11|1=January 11}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|ja|後白河上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317984}}’s son, Prince Morihito, acceded, becoming the 78th {{ill|Emperor Nijō|en|Emperor Nijō|qid=Q440149|lt=Emperor Nijō|1=Emperor Nijō}}. * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 15th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1547|en|1547|qid=Q6547|lt=1547|1=1547}} {{ill|January 11|en|January 11|qid=Q2247|lt=January 11|1=January 11}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|en|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|qid=Q447066|lt=Ashikaga Yositoki|1=Ashikaga Yoshiteru}} became the 13th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|ja|足利幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町幕府|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町幕府|1=Ashikaga shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|February 9|en|February 9|qid=Q2324|lt=February 9|1=February 9}}) – The new penal code, the {{ill|New Penal Code|ja|新律綱領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Penal Code|1=New Penal Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97182202}}, was promulgated as the first criminal code of the Meiji government. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1694|en|1694|qid=Q7694|lt=1694|1=1694}} {{ill|January 15|en|January 15|qid=Q2260|lt=January 15|1=January 15}}) – {{ill|Noro Mototake|ja|野呂元丈|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noro Mototake|1=Noro Genjō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6531817}}, a herbal/pharmacognosy scholar (died {{ill|1761|en|1761|qid=Q7649|lt=1761|1=1761}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1853|en|1853|qid=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}} {{ill|January 29|en|January 29|qid=Q2286|lt=January 29|1=January 29}}) – {{ill|Kitasato Shibasaburō|en|Kitasato Shibasaburō|qid=Q442225|lt=Kitasato Shibasaburō|1=Kitasato Shibasaburō}}, a bacteriologist (died {{ill|1931|en|1931|qid=Q18782|lt=1931|1=1931}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} {{ill|January 18|en|January 18|qid=Q2265|lt=January 18|1=January 18}}) – {{ill|Katayama Tōkuma|en|Katayama Tōkuma|qid=Q898689|lt=Katayama Higashikuma|1=Katayama Tōkuma}}, an architect (died {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Ninju|en|Ninju|qid=Q1373077|lt=Ninju|1=Ninju}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|853|en|853|qid=Q30367|lt=853|1=853}} {{ill|February 1|en|February 1|qid=Q2312|lt=February 1|1=February 1}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Myō|ja|源明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Myō|1=Minamoto no Akira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11564111}}, a kugyō (born {{ill|814|en|814|qid=Q23447|lt=814|1=814}}). == Commemorations == == 歌 == A song titled “December 20” by the Hong Kong singer {{ill|Kay Tse|ja|ケイツェ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kay Tse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135490483|1=Kay Tse}}.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|19|12|21|11|20|1|12|1220|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
